response.justification: While the candidate has over 15 years of robust software engineering and entrepreneurial experience meeting the minimum tenure requirements, they lack the recognized AI expertise and strategic advisory background necessary for a Director-level Principal role. Their exposure to AI is very recent and heavily implementation-focused rather than strategic.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering and architectural experience
Demonstrated entrepreneurial drive and open-source leadership
concerns: Lacks recognized expertise and deep background in AI strategy
Profile aligns more with hands-on Staff Engineering than Director-level strategic advisory
Missing preferred advanced degree in an AI-related field
